title: BLUELIGHT: Total Detections (24h)
description: Single KPI tile showing the total number of BLUELIGHT-related detection events fired across all stages in the last 24h. Highlights demo-time activity at a glance.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Sysmon Network Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Event Security Logs') and ('Source Process' like '%bluelight.exe' or 'Process Name' like '%bluelight.exe' or 'Parent Process Name' like '%iexplore.exe' or 'Destination Hostname' like '%graph.microsoft.com%' or 'Destination Hostname' like '%mail.google.com%' or 'Destination Hostname' like '%jquery.services%' or 'Granted Access' = '0x1fffff' or 'Target Filename' like '%bluelight.pdb%' or 'Target Filename' like '%cheV01%' or 'Target Filename' like '%INTEG.RAW%' or 'Command Line' like '%FromBase64String%' or 'Command Line' like '%ipinfo.io%' or 'Command Line' like '%cookie_name: OSID%') | stats count as Detections

ask_ai_prompts: Why are detections elevated right now?
